prompt: A high-fashion full-body editorial photograph of a barefoot woman standing and stepping forward on rippled desert sand, wearing a dramatic flowing deep sapphire blue chiffon gown with a plunging halter neckline, wrapped waist, very high thigh slit, and an extremely long sheer train billowing powerfully to the right in the wind. Her dark brown hair is long and loose, blown sideways across the frame, and she wears delicate earrings, a bracelet, and a subtle necklace. Pose her in elegant side profile with her torso lifted, one leg extended through the slit, one hand lightly holding the fabric, creating a sense of motion and grace. Set the scene in a bright open desert or dry lakebed with pale sand, soft distant mountains low on the horizon, and swirling clouds of dust around her feet and behind her. Use warm late-afternoon backlighting with a hazy sunlit sky, soft golden-beige atmosphere, strong fabric translucency, cinematic movement, luxury fashion magazine styling, ultra-realistic texture, and a clean minimal background that emphasizes the dress and wind.
